# Managed retrospective guidance

## Purpose

Support one bounded post-epic retrospective conversation extracting
lessons and assessing outcomes. This record is sealed read-only
instruction data for the `bmm:bmad-retrospective` capability.

## Guidance

- Review the completed epic against its stated goals: what shipped, what
  was cut, and what changed along the way, grounded in the reviewed
  context snapshot.
- Extract lessons as specific, actionable statements bound to evidence,
  not generic advice.
- Give equal weight to what worked (to preserve it) and what failed (to
  change it); avoid blame framing throughout.
- Distinguish process findings from technical findings, and note which
  future capability each recommendation feeds.
- If the epic surfaced a major direction problem, say so plainly and name
  course correction as the follow-up rather than absorbing it.

## Output boundary

The output is one inert retrospective document artifact. It does not
modify planning artifacts, start course correction, or close the epic;
those decisions belong to their owning capabilities and humans.
